name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug in @kiwa/core, @kiwa/cli, or the skill chain
labels: bug
---

## Summary

<!-- A clear, one-line description of the bug. -->

## Reproducer

<!-- Provide a minimal reproducer (preferably a public repo link or copy-paste a 10-30 line snippet). -->

```ts
// e.g. import { dappE2eTest } from "@kiwa/core"
// ... minimal failing case
```

## Expected behavior

<!-- What did you expect to happen? -->

## Actual behavior

<!-- What actually happened? Include the error message + stack trace if any. -->

```
<paste error here>
```

## Environment

- kiwa version: `@kiwa/core@x.y.z` / `@kiwa/cli@x.y.z`
- Node.js version: `node --version`
- pnpm / npm version:
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows
- Foundry (`anvil --version`) :
- Playwright Chromium installed? (`pnpm exec playwright --version`)
